differential_diagnoses: Common Variable Immunodeficiency (CVID) with granulomatous-lymphocytic interstitial lung disease (GLILD)
next_steps: Quantitative serum immunoglobulin levels (IgG, IgA, IgM)
Measurement of vaccine-specific antibody titers (pneumococcal, tetanus, diphtheria)
Dihydrorhodamine (DHR) flow cytometry assay for CGD
Whole-exome sequencing or targeted primary immunodeficiency gene panel
Repeat liver biopsy with molecular testing (e.g., 16S rRNA gene sequencing or metagenomic next-generation sequencing)
Consultation with clinical immunology and infectious disease
